# Regulations

This section groups SBS controls by regulation and framework tags such as `NIST`, `GDPR`, and `ISO 27001`.

These mappings are indicative only. They help readers browse the benchmark through a compliance lens, but they do not replace a formal gap assessment or direct review of the underlying framework requirements.

## Available Views

| Regulation | Tagged Controls | Page |
|------------|----------------:|------|
| HIPAA | 16 | [View page](/regulations/hipaa) |
| GDPR | 32 | [View page](/regulations/gdpr) |
| NIST | 28 | [View page](/regulations/nist) |
| CCPA/CPRA | 21 | [View page](/regulations/ccpa-cpra) |
| SOC 2 | 33 | [View page](/regulations/soc-2) |
| ISO 27001 | 50 | [View page](/regulations/iso-27001) |

## How To Use These Pages

- Use each regulation page as an index into the benchmark, not as a replacement for the benchmark pages.
- Each listed control links back to its canonical benchmark section.
- Untagged controls are intentionally excluded from these views.
